table.style: width:auto; cell-padding:0px; cell-spacing:0px; page-break-inside:auto; border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid; background-color:none; head-row-background-color:none; alt-row-background-color:none;

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:1px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.03; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Performing inspection or maintenance operation without turning OFF the machine power (Refer to NOTE)

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Electric shock, breakdown of the machine, abnormal operation, fire

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Touching a device with residual voltage (Refer to NOTE)

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Breakdown of the machine, abnormal operation, fire

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Loose screw in terminal block or other location

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Breakdown of the machine, abnormal operation, fire

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Machine controller door or junction box cover is left open

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.03; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Electric leakage, breakdown of the machine, abnormal operation, fire

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Damage to wiring on floor surrounding machine

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Electric leakage, breakdown of the machine, abnormal operation, fire

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;
para.text: Operation or maintenance by non-qualified personnel

para.style: text-align:left; text-indent:0px; margin-top:3px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:0px; margin-left:8px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:none;

list.li: Prior to performing maintenance of the servo amplifiers, spindle amplifiers, and inverters, turn OFF the main power switch and confirm that the LED which indicates charging (red) for each amplifier and inverter is off.
High voltage current flows through components inside the junction box.
High voltage current continues to flow on the primary side of the main power switch even after the main power supply is turned OFF.
Electrical current continues to flow to lamps and outlets in the machine controller even after the main power supply is turned OFF.
